# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The following versions are supported. Please be sure to play with one of these versions.
| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 5.0 β | :white_check_mark: |
| 4.7 | :warning: |
| 4.0 | :x: |
| Supabase mode | :wrench: |

<!-- ## Reporting a Vulnerability -->
